So we've been experimenting, like we've been actually using different research agents.
So we use Tavilli and we use EXA.
EXA is probably the most advanced one, but both are really good at finding really high quality information.
They find PDFs of like white papers, e-books, like sometimes even things that are like typically behind like a gated, like a form.
They will.

find like the PDF behind that, so yeah, the research agent is a really, really important component, because when we give it an assignment title and an assignment direction, so we say, okay, this is a how-to article about XYZ topic, it should contain the following sections, and it should mention our client in like these sections.

The researcher is going to take the assignment direction and then come up with a huge list of questions that it has to answer in order to provide the AI with enough information to write a comprehensive article, so this is how we avoid having really thin content that just kind of like talks in circles, which is what typically happens with, if you ever used Claude or ChatGPT to try to write an article, you probably ran into a situation where it was just like talking about the same thing over and over again, it's because it doesn't have enough information, so that's how we avoid that.
Yeah, and all of these different agents at different points get looped in in order to add links, check links, do proofread, add meta tags, do fact checking.
then after all of that is done, we actually still have a manual reviewer come in and take a look at it.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review initial content and align on the content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**First Draft for Calibration:** A draft article is live for Panther's review (48–72 hr turnaround) to calibrate GrowthX's AI content engine on Panther's voice and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [**Content Calendar Approved:** The initial calendar was approved, with a key refinement to narrow broad topics like "AIOps" to Panther's core focus (e.g., "detection and response").](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [**CTA Strategy Defined:** The default CTA is now a live demo webinar—a lower-friction entry point than a direct demo request—with specific CTAs for relevant articles.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking Setup:** GrowthX will configure Looker and its AI Visibility Platform to track organic traffic, LLM citations, and competitive rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)

## Topics

### Content Engine & Calibration

  - [GrowthX's AI engine uses advanced research agents (EXA, Tavilli) to find high-quality sources (e.g., white papers), avoiding the "thin content" common with general LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [The workflow includes research, writing, linking, fact-checking, and a final manual editor review.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [The first draft article is live for Panther's feedback, which will be used to fine-tune the engine's output.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)

### Content Calendar Review

  - [The calendar balances high-volume keywords with high-intent, lower-volume terms (e.g., "SIM alternatives").](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [**Approved Topics:**](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [What is Security Automation?](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [What is AI Threat Intelligence?](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - [What is AI SIM? (Will incorporate "AI-enabled" as a descriptor)](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
      - [LLM Security: Risks & Best Practices (Addresses analyst trust in AI)](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [MCP Tools (High interest; can use existing webinar as CTA)](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [**Refinement for "AIOps" Topic:**](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Narrow the scope to Panther's core → "detection and response use cases" or "SOC operations/workflows."](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
      - [**GrowthX Action:** Research if this narrower focus will hurt SEO ranking. If so, create a separate long-tail article.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### CTA & Analytics Strategy

  - [**CTA Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
      - [**Default:** Live demo webinar registration (lower-friction entry).](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
      - [**Specific:** Use relevant assets (e.g., MCP webinar) for targeted articles.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [**CTA Banners:** GrowthX will provide examples for Panther's agency to build in Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [**Analytics:** Panther will connect GrowthX with its MOPS contractor to improve site journey tracking, which is currently limited.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

### Performance Tracking & Competitive Strategy

  - [**Looker Dashboard:** Tracks organic traffic and LLM-driven visits.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Platform:** Tracks rankings for evaluation-stage prompts against competitors (e.g., Splunk).](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
      - [**Action:** Add all calendar keywords as prompts to track performance.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
      - [**Rationale:** "Versus" articles rank quickly in LLMs, influencing how they discuss Panther vs. competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [**Paid Media Alignment:** Panther will share its paid keyword list to align content and landing pages with paid campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Panther:**](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [Review the first draft article by EOD Jan 22 or Jan 23.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [Connect GrowthX with the MOPS contractor.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
      - [Share the paid keyword list.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [Share the second draft article for review.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [Provide CTA banner examples.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
      - [Configure the Looker dashboard and AI Visibility Platform.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
      - [Research the "AIOps" topic refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/oNtzRbXc5ypY9zusQst3seFtp6YfAHWN?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
